Disappointed and the lodge needs managing.

All in all poor value for money.

title: “Comfortable lodge but avoid any activities they offer. Be warned”
positive: Property is in an off road location by the river. Comfortable and clean lodges, staff friendly and helpful. Food very good for a lodge of this type
negative:
Unfortunately the transportation for the activities was not in the “Boteti” safari jeep as in the adverts. It was a wreck of a vehicle that had been hired. It had no tread on the tyres, broken suspension. No padding on the seats and no working ac or heat in the cabin. These were long 6 hr plus drives in this unsafe vehicle. After complaining over some weeks about this the “director” refuses compensation other than a free night stay and game drive if we return! Absolutely no use when it was a one off trip from the UK. After saying I would publish this live to warn travellers this is exactly what I am doing. 
Beware!!

title: “Bittersweet feelings”
negative:
I have bittersweet feelings and it's really hard for me to rate this stay.
During the overnight stay, part of our group was robbed (someone cut the tent right in the place where phones were charging, there was cash, passports, etc.).
I understand that such situations happen, but unfortunately after returning to Poland it turned out that we couldn't count on any compensation from either the insurer or the owner - we got information that the thieves had been caught and that was it.
That's why I don't really know how to evaluate it - on the one hand it was ok, but on the other this unpleasant situation cast a shadow over the entire stay. I'm sorry that the owner didn't show any willingness to cooperate/some compensation or even a discount on future stays - it would have been a nice gesture, but it was a lack of understanding on his part.
Unfortunately, we won't be returning to this place, it's a pity.

title: “Disappointing.”
positive: The staff were great and the place adequate.
negative: The accommodation was lovely, but completely misrepresented on the website.  There are images of animals, water, game drives and such the like, making the lodge appear as if it is on a river (which it is but it was dry and largely domesticated - goats, cattle etc).   On arrival we were informed that we would have to take game drives at $300 and that it was a 2.5 hour to Moremi.   For heavens sake please get a new piece of glass for your table!  You can order from PG glass in Maun.

title: “Boteti Tented Safari Lodge is a no go to place!”
positive: Could they reimburse my money that's all. The horrific experience forced me to check-out earlier and find an alternative stay.
negative:
They make use of the raw water from the river.
They don't have a manager on-site to attend to queries.
They don't take accountability. Instead, you'll be referred to a particular individual by the name of "Nedine Myburg." Who's based in South Africa and can only assit on "Whatsapp chats". How absurd is that?!
There's false marketing as there is no Spa place.
On a hot sunny day, you can't even take a swim as the pool is filthy dirty as if it's a pigsty.
